data.body: Remediation complete. next_batch 62.7%->99.2% (survivors 236->6), reducer/_processors 97.3%->99.4% (19->5). Rewrote change-detector test_library_and_mcp_shape (was batch_size==2+schema only) to assert epic id/title, exact batch-item dicts, skip buckets. Added tests/interfaces/test_next_batch_behavior.py (13 in-process tests over compute/to_json_dict/render_*) and tests/scripts/reducer/test_reducer_record_fields.py (10 tests pinning REVERT/BRIDGE_ALERT/VERIFY_COMMANDS record fields). Remaining survivors (6 next_batch matrix-spacing, 5 _processors unused-param/dead-fallback) are equivalent/cosmetic, documented. Config in pyproject [tool.mutmut], doc at docs/mutation-testing.md. Full suite: 1749 passed/9 skipped (broad) + 8 passed (integration); ruff check+format clean. NOT committed (orchestrator commits).
